title: carpinus fargesiana var. fargesiana
intro: Carpinus fargesiana var. fargesiana, also known as Chinese hornbeam, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, which can help to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Carpinus fargesiana var. fargesiana include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
